EmailTemplate.name: ARRH - Induction invite reminder
EmailTemplate.subject: Time to book your Alliance Rural & Remote Health Induction Session
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
BOOK YOUR INDUCTION SESSION AND GET STARTED.
Hi {!Candidate.FirstName},
Your first Alliance shift is just around the corner! But first you need to complete the Alliance Rural & Remote Health Induction.
Start by selecting a day and time that suits you:
BOOK MY INDUCTION
You will receive your uniform and ID badge via mail in 2-5 business days.
If you have any question, you can always call us on 07 4998 5550.
Kind regards, Your team at Alliance Rural & Remote Health
